_comment: Dataset Capability Matrix — source of truth for adaptive task filtering.
_audit_note: competency_tagging corrected to false for both UCI and OULAD after DB audit confirmed competency_tag=NULL 100% in both datasets. proxy_competency_available added to capture fallback strategy.

_taxonomy.assessment_scores: Dataset contains normalized assessment scores per student
_taxonomy.final_outcome: Dataset contains final pass/fail/withdraw outcome per enrollment
_taxonomy.submission_history: Dataset contains per-assessment submission records (student, score, pass_flag)
_taxonomy.submission_timestamps: Dataset contains submission_day and due_day for lateness analysis
_taxonomy.demographics: Dataset contains student demographic fields (age, gender, education level)
_taxonomy.lifestyle_factors: Dataset contains lifestyle fields (alcohol, go_out, health, free_time)
_taxonomy.family_context: Dataset contains family-related fields (family_size, family_relation, school_support)
_taxonomy.socioeconomic_context: Dataset contains socioeconomic fields (imd_score, disability, internet_access)
_taxonomy.engagement_tracking: Dataset contains VLE click-stream data per enrollment (engagement table)
_taxonomy.resource_clickstream: Dataset contains per-resource engagement breakdown (event_category/type in engagement)
_taxonomy.temporal_activity: Dataset contains week-number indexed engagement for trend analysis
_taxonomy.absence_tracking: Dataset contains raw absence count per enrollment
_taxonomy.studytime_tracking: Dataset contains weekly study time self-report per enrollment
_taxonomy.competency_tagging: Assessment table has competency_tag field natively populated (requires explicit competency ontology in source dataset)
_taxonomy.proxy_competency_available: Dataset has assessment_name populated and can serve as proxy competency label via COALESCE fallback when competency_tag is null
_taxonomy.multi_student_comparison: Dataset has at least 2 students per class for comparison tasks
